authorship: Original vector compositions authored for The Kind Gods of Ilyon runtime. No external art, stock imagery, model weights, or third-party source files were incorporated.
license: Project-owned; distributed under the repository license for this runtime use.
releaseBoundary: This pack completes the Confluence Observatory environment, Aster Neral lead portrait, and observatory framing layer. Existing cartridge-owned pixel cast and motif assets remain authoritative for the wider campaign.

assets.responsiveIntent: cover crop preserves the central tide orrery, ocean horizon, and public council table

assets.subject: Aster Neral, astronomer of Ilyon
assets.responsiveIntent: portrait crop remains legible in the Godscar cast ledger on desktop and mobile
nacre arches, coral, and tideglass may crop while council and navigation controls remain unobstructed

required: Vite production build resolves every asset URL
desktop Chromium renders the observatory and Aster Neral portrait
mobile Chromium preserves Godscar evidence and navigation controls
existing Ilyon campaign, evidence, and custody receipts remain green
